reasoning: The order contains a critical fraud alert noting 11 refunds in 73 days with 85% refund rate, all previously claiming 'item not received' despite confirmed delivery. Although this request cites 'wrong size/color', the established pattern of suspicious activity and explicit staff instruction 'DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately' requires escalation rather than direct approval/denial.
